name: Dashboard Clear All — clicking Clear All opens permanent deletion confirmation modal

planSteps.description: Navigate to https://onenotify-7593c.web.app after setting window.localStorage.setItem('paired_mobile_uid', 'test_mobile_uid_device_101') so the Timeline Dashboard screen is shown.
Click the red 'Clear All' button in the top right header.
An AlertDialog confirmation modal appears with the exact title 'Clear All Notifications'.

The dialog body shows the warning text: 'Are you sure you want to permanently delete all notifications from both the cloud and the web timeline?' and presents both 'Cancel' and 'Clear All' action buttons.
Click the 'Cancel' button inside the dialog.
The confirmation dialog modal closes and the timeline dashboard remains visible.
